summary: Iteration 74 - Official Curriculum Tab Testing. All backend APIs (34/34 tests passed) and frontend UI verified working. The 'المنهج الرسمي' tab in School Settings displays official curriculum data from Saudi Ministry of Education correctly.

tests: Click on official curriculum tab - PASSED
Verify header 'المنهج الرسمي - وزارة التعليم' - PASSED
Verify stats display (stages, tracks, grades, subjects) - PASSED
Verify stages section with 3 stages - PASSED
Verify tracks section with 8 tracks - PASSED
Click on stage shows grades - PASSED
Click on grade shows curriculum table - PASSED

official_curriculum_stats_api.details: GET /api/official-curriculum/stats returns correct counts: 3 stages, 8 tracks, 29 grades, 75 subjects, 393 mappings, 7 teacher ranks

official_curriculum_stages_api.details: GET /api/official-curriculum/stages returns Elementary, Middle, Secondary stages with correct structure

official_curriculum_tracks_api.details: GET /api/official-curriculum/tracks returns 8 tracks including General Education, Quran Memorization, etc.

official_curriculum_grades_api.details: GET /api/official-curriculum/grades with stage_id filter returns correct grades with enriched stage/track names

official_curriculum_teacher_rank_loads_a.details: GET /api/official-curriculum/teacher-rank-loads returns 7 teacher ranks with weekly periods (14-24)

official_curriculum_for_grade_api.details: GET /api/official-curriculum/curriculum-for-grade/{grade_id} returns complete curriculum with subjects, annual/weekly periods

official_curriculum_tab_ui.details: Tab displays with green color, shows stats, stages, tracks, and interactive grade selection

grade_curriculum_table.details: Selecting a grade shows curriculum table with subjects, categories, annual/weekly periods

updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_official_curriculum_api.py - Created comprehensive test file for official curriculum APIs
seed_data_creation: Official curriculum data was pre-seeded by main agent including stages, tracks, grades, subjects, grade-subject mappings, and teacher rank loads
context_for_next_testing_agent: Official Curriculum feature is fully working. The tab 'المنهج الرسمي' in School Settings displays read-only data from Saudi Ministry of Education. All APIs return correct data with proper structure. Frontend correctly displays stats, stages, tracks, grades, and curriculum tables.
